results.title: Angadipuram Tali Sree Mahadeva Temple: An Ancient Shiva Shrine of Valluvanad
results.description: The word Tali in Kerala’s historical setting commonly refers to an important Shiva temple associated with an established settlement or regional centre. Such temples often became focal points for worship, community gatherings, learning, land administration and cultural activity. The presence of a Tali temple therefore indicates the former importance of Angadipuram as a well-organised religious and social centre. The post Angadipuram Tali Sree Mahadeva Temple: An Ancient Shiva Shrine of Valluvanad appeared first on Dharmakshethra - India Unabridged | Defence, Diplomacy, Economy, Health, Ayurveda, Heritage .

results.title: 20-Year-Old Stabbed to Death by Ex-Boyfriend in Nashik, Accused Found Hanging Hours Later
results.description: A 20-year-old student was allegedly stabbed to death by her ex-boyfriend in Nashik, Maharashtra. Police suspect a murder-suicide linked to a one-sided love affair after the accused was found hanging hours later.

results.title: Jammu Flash Floods: CM Abdullah Takes Stock As Rescue Ops Underway; Yatras Suspended
results.description: Cloudburst-like rainfall triggered flash floods in Rajouri, leaving one woman missing and causing widespread damage to homes, vehicles and commercial establishments.

results.title: Have Diabetes? Experts Say Don't Skip This 10-Minute Routine After Meals
results.description: Light walking after meals may help your body process food more efficiently while supporting healthy blood sugar levels.
